description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade features a small covered porch with a tiled floor, a single main door, and two large rectangular windows, one of which is shaded by a protruding awning. The exterior walls are finished in a light cream color, with a section of brickwork visible on the lower right side of the front. The sides and rear of the house are plain, with no visible windows or doors, and the roof extends symmetrically from front to back. The house sits on a paved area at the front, suggesting a small entry patio or walkway. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A single-story cream-colored house with a reddish-brown gable roof, front porch, and large windows. The design is simple, with a small entry patio and minimal exterior ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large windows (one with an awning), a small covered porch, and a section of brickwork.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the long, plain cream wall and the full length of the gable roof, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the simple, unadorned back wall and the symmetrical gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain cream wall and the roof, with a partial glimpse of the front porch area.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small covered porch, tiled floor, and a single step; one window with an awning.
